Workshop · Handoff

Vacation Care — PES (mobile booking) — Developer Handoff

Build from this spec, not from Figma. The runnable prototype is the source of truth for pixels; this page is the contract for behaviour, states, tokens, redlines, accessibility, and acceptance.

Status: In review · Version 0.2 (2026-06-25) · Direction: Dark mobile · Spec: HANDOFF.md · Agent export: manifest.json

▶ Open the prototype

Scope & flow map

IDScreenPurposePrototype
S1BookingsLanding: see the month's bookings and start a new one.open
S2New Vacation Care BookingAssemble a booking: child, booking type, sessions.open
S3Select ChildChoose the child the booking is for.open
S4Select SessionMulti-select vacation-care sessions across dates.open
S5Review BookingReview line items, apply promo, see totals.open
S6Booking detailView a (requested/confirmed) booking's detail.open

S1 · Bookings

▶ open the live screen

Landing: see the month's bookings and start a new one. Entry: App open (Bookings tab) · Exit: New → S2; tap a booking card → S6

ElementText
TitleBookings
NewNew
BannerJuly Holiday Program Now Open
ElementSpec
Today30px orange-500 filled circle
Booking dot5px orange-500 dot under the date
Bannercyan-500 fill, radius 12

Interaction & behaviour

  • ‘＋ New’ opens the New Vacation Care Booking form (S2).
  • Tapping the booking card opens its detail (S6).
  • Tab bar shows the Bookings tab active (other tabs out of scope).

Acceptance criteria

  • ‘New’ opens the booking form.
  • Today is the only filled calendar day; dots mark bookings.

S2 · New Vacation Care Booking

▶ open the live screen

Assemble a booking: child, booking type, sessions. Entry: From S1 New · Exit: Fields open S3/S4; Review → S5 when child + ≥1 session

ElementText
TitleNew Vacation Care Booking
Booking typeCasual — For one-off sessions
Session(s) value{n} sessions selected
CTAReview
ElementSpec
Field56px, radius 14, border grey-1000; Session(s) trailing clear-X when set

Interaction & behaviour

  • Child's name → S3; Session(s) → S4.
  • Booking type toggles Casual ⇄ Recurring.
  • The Session(s) clear-X empties the selection.
  • Review enabled only with a child and ≥1 session.

Acceptance criteria

  • Review disabled until child + ≥1 session.
  • Session(s) field shows the count and can be cleared.

S3 · Select Child

▶ open the live screen

Choose the child the booking is for. Entry: From S2 Child's name · Exit: Tap a child → S2

ElementText
RowGemma Santiago — Little Seeds OSHC
ElementSpec
Rowavatar 40px, name 16px, service grey-500

Interaction & behaviour

  • Tapping a child sets it and returns to S2.

Acceptance criteria

  • Selecting a child returns to S2 with it set.

S4 · Select Session

▶ open the live screen

Multi-select vacation-care sessions across dates. Entry: From S2 Session(s) · Exit: Save → S2 with selection

ElementText
Date headersMON, 17 MAY 2026 / TUES, 18 MAY 2026 …
WaitlistWaitlist Only
Footer{n} selected · Save
ElementSpec
Checkbox22px, radius 5; checked = orange-500 fill + white tick
Waitlist pillpurple-550

Interaction & behaviour

  • Tapping a row toggles its checkbox; the footer count updates.
  • Save (enabled with ≥1) writes the selection back to S2; the field shows the count.
  • Opening the picker pre-checks the already-selected sessions.

Acceptance criteria

  • Save disabled until ≥1 selected.
  • Selection round-trips to S2.

S5 · Review Booking

▶ open the live screen

Review line items, apply promo, see totals. Entry: From S2 Review · Exit: Confirm → S6; back → S2

ElementText
TitleReview Booking
PromoPROMOCODE10 — Promo code applied
TotalTOTAL NOW {available − 10%}
CTAConfirm
ElementSpec
Line itemdate header w/ calendar icon + remove-X; fee right-aligned; waitlist = purple pill, no fee

Interaction & behaviour

  • Removing a line item drops it from the booking and recomputes totals.
  • Only non-waitlist (available) sessions count toward the subtotal.
  • Promo applies a 10% discount to the available subtotal; TOTAL NOW = subtotal − discount.
  • Confirm advances to the booking detail (S6).

Acceptance criteria

  • Subtotal counts available sessions only.
  • TOTAL NOW = subtotal − 10%.
  • Removing an item recomputes the total.

S6 · Booking detail

▶ open the live screen

View a (requested/confirmed) booking's detail. Entry: From S5 Confirm, or a booking card on S1 · Exit: Cancel Booking → resets to S1

ElementText
NavBooking request
HeadingVacation Care Booking
TimesStart 7:15am – End 6:00pm
CTACancel Booking
ElementSpec
Hero150px; dark radial gradient + 78px teal-gradient planet + star dots
Cancel Bookingorange-500 outline ghost button

Interaction & behaviour

  • Cancel Booking resets the flow back to S1 (Bookings).

Acceptance criteria

  • Cancel Booking returns to S1.

State & edge matrix

StateTriggerUICopyRecoveryPrototype
cta-disabledBooking incompletedisabled CTAReviewAdd child + ≥1 sessionopen
waitlistWaitlist-only sessionpurple pill; excluded from subtotalWaitlist Onlyn/aopen
save-disabledNo sessions tickeddisabled SaveSaveTick ≥1 sessionopen

Platform deltas

Areaiosandroid
Status barsystem status barsystem status bar
Tab barbottom tab barbottom nav

Open questions

QuestionOwnerDueStatus
Recurring booking: full weekly-pattern builder is out of scope here — confirm its own flow.Sam2026-07-02open
Source of session availability / waitlist / pricing and promo validation (API).David2026-07-02open
Booking detail covers request/confirmed; confirm the withdraw/cancel variants (teal 'Withdraw Request' card) are a separate state.Sam2026-07-02open

Changelog

VersionDateChange
0.12026-06-25Initial PES handoff (generic Simplify Bookings flow — superseded).
0.22026-06-25Rebuilt to the actual Vacation Care mobile screens: Bookings landing, New Vacation Care Booking, multi-select Select Session, Review Booking (line items + promo), booking detail (cosmic hero).
